_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: S462 cells were most responsive... viability decreases of S462 cells were significant in an agent concentration range of 20 to 120 μM (p ≤ 0.031)
details: Most responsive MPNST cell line to 3-BrPA treatment with significant viability reduction at 20-120 μM (p ≤ 0.031)
